overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a futuristic city at night. The clip begins on a rooftop with holographic fish swimming through the air, then transitions to a rainy urban plaza with neon-lit streets and pedestrians. The camera moves smoothly through the environment, descending from an elevated walkway to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation deck with holographic displays

events.description: large blue holographic fish materializes and swims across the sky
red holographic fish appears and swims across the view
scene fades to black transitioning to urban plaza

agents.ego_description: standing on a geometric light-patterned rooftop observing holographic fish swimming between skyscrapers

tall futuristic towers with illuminated advertisements and vertical neon strips
glowing blue translucent fish hologram swimming through the air
glowing red-orange translucent fish hologram with flowing fins

segments.scene_description: Standing on a futuristic rooftop with a geometric light-patterned floor, observing large holographic fish swimming through the misty night air between neon-lit skyscrapers. The blue fish swims across first, followed by a red fish, before the scene transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban plaza with neon commercial stalls

events.description: fade in to elevated walkway overlooking rainy city plaza
descending stairs from elevated walkway to ground level
approaching brightly lit pink neon circular food stall

agents.ego_description: walking through rainy cyberpunk city plaza, following a pedestrian in an orange jacket down stairs to street level

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket and green pants walking ahead down the stairs
group of people gathered around the neon-lit food stall

entered.detail: red metal railing along the elevated pedestrian walkway
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
circular structure with bright pink and red neon lighting serving food
tropical trees scattered throughout the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through a rainy cyberpunk plaza at night, starting from an elevated walkway with neon-lit railings, descending stairs past pedestrians, and approaching a brightly lit pink food stall. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon signs and streetlights while sparse crowds walk through the misty atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a surreal, high-altitude rooftop into the rainy depths of a neon-lit urban plaza. It begins on a geometric light-patterned floor, observing large blue and red holographic fish swimming through the misty night air between towering skyscrapers. As the perspective shifts, the camera moves away from the heights and onto an elevated walkway with neon-lit railings. The scene then descends a set of stairs past pedestrians, transitioning from the open air to the wet pavement of a street-level plaza where vibrant signs reflect off the rain-slicked ground. Finally, the movement glides through the misty atmosphere and sparse crowds toward a brightly lit pink food stall.
